title: Bridges are public utilities
doc_html:
§853.  Bridges are public utilities

Any bridge constructed, acquired, extended, or improved under the terms of this Sub-part for the use of which tolls are charged is a revenue producing public utility.
doc_text:
§853.  Bridges are public utilities
Any bridge constructed, acquired, extended, or improved under the terms of this Sub-part for the use of which tolls are charged is a revenue producing public utility.
